description: Analyzes the stylistic quality of a selected passage or chapter. Flags language issues, repetitions, rhythm breaks, and narrative density problems.

steps.description: Load the active narrator's character sheet
Get currently selected text from editor

steps.prompt:
You are a literary stylist and writing coach. Analyze the selected passage according to the provided narrator profile.

Flag issues with:
- Language tics and repetitions
- Rhythm breaks (sentence length, flow)
- Narrative density (too dense or too sparse)
- Voice consistency with the declared character profile
- Syntax and grammatical issues

Return a JSON array of signals in this exact format:
[
  {
    "location": "Paragraph 1" | "Line 5-7",
    "signal": "Type of issue (e.g., Repetition, Sentence length, Voice mismatch)",
    "suggestion": "Specific improvement suggestion"
  }
]

Only return the JSON array, no other text.
Be specific and actionable in your suggestions.
